steps.title: Focus on TO66 for this audience
steps.content: The audience already knows Jane Luu, so the sentence should not spend space introducing her career. It should emphasize the discovery of (19308) 1996 TO66 itself, including the date and collaborators.

steps.title: Reject split focus
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B divide attention between two minor planets. Choice C foregrounds Luu's general reputation instead of the specific discovery of (19308) 1996 TO66. The answer is D.
